faqs.question: Why are flies such a problem in Cypress Hills, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Cypress Hills experiences fly issues due to its dense residential population, numerous food establishments along Jamaica and Fulton Avenues, proximity to parks, and older building stock. Warm weather, trash storage areas, and nearby green spaces create ideal breeding conditions for various fly species throughout the neighborhood.
